features.name: malformed_numeric_literal_with_underscore_after_base
features.description: Code should include a numeric literal with underscore immediately after the base specifier character (e.g., 1'b_) which is invalid Verilog syntax

features.name: comparison_operator_with_real_arithmetic
features.description: Code should include a comparison operator with real arithmetic expression in the right operand

features.name: ternary_operator_with_negative_literal_in_both_branches
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with negative literal as the true branch and a sized decimal literal as the false branch

features.name: nested_ternary_with_mixed_types
features.description: Code should include nested ternary operators with mixed types (integer literals, sized decimal literals, and real literals)

features.name: localparam_real_initialization
features.description: Code should include localparam declarations with real type initialization using decimal values
